description: You are a librarian managing digital documents in the Nuxeo Platform content management system. Publish the 'Annual Report 2023' document (path: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023) to the 'Public Reports' section (path: /default-domain/sections/Public-Reports). Use the Publish action to create a proxy in the destination, ensuring the original document remains in the Projects workspace.
